item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: MailDivert PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailDivert PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mathew045
item.itunes:summary:
MailDivert PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PST Converter for Mac & Windows for instant migration of Outlook PST files to MBOX, PDF, EML, HTML, MSG, DOC, PNG, IMAP, Office 365, Exchange, Yahoo etc. The simple GUI of Mac PST Converter ensures easy and effortless migration of Outlook PST files without any data loss. In addition, the software provides separate option to convert PST contacts to vCard and calendars to ICS formats. Besides that, the software supports batch mode option to convert unlimited PST files at once in single processing. Using advance filters of the Outlook File Converter users can move only required PST items instead of complete data. Preview functionality, file naming options, attachment saving options etc. are some other beneficial features that helps users in converting PST files in a complete seamless manner. Free Demo edition of the software permits users to check its specifications and all associated features absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
item.description:
MailDivert PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PST Converter for Mac & Windows for instant migration of Outlook PST files to MBOX, PDF, EML, HTML, MSG, DOC, PNG, IMAP, Office 365, Exchange, Yahoo etc. The simple GUI of Mac PST Converter ensures easy and effortless migration of Outlook PST files without any data loss. In addition, the software provides separate option to convert PST contacts to vCard and calendars to ICS formats. Besides that, the software supports batch mode option to convert unlimited PST files at once in single processing. Using advance filters of the Outlook File Converter users can move only required PST items instead of complete data. Preview functionality, file naming options, attachment saving options etc. are some other beneficial features that helps users in converting PST files in a complete seamless manner. Free Demo edition of the software permits users to check its specifications and all associated features absolutely free of cost.

[read more]

(Utilities)
Download MailDivert PST Converter for Mac & Windows for instant migration of Outlook PST files to MBOX, PDF, EML, HTML, MSG, DOC, PNG, IMAP, Office 365, Exchange, Yahoo etc. The simple GUI of Mac PST Converter ensures easy and effortless migration of Outlook PST files without any data loss. In addition, the software provides separate option to convert PST contacts to vCard and calendars to ICS formats. Besides that, the software supports batch mode option to convert unlimited PST files at once in single processing. Using advance filters of the Outlook File Converter users can move only required PST items instead of complete data. Preview functionality, file naming options, attachment saving options etc. are some other beneficial features that helps users in converting PST files in a complete seamless manner. Free Demo edition of the software permits users to check its specifications and all associated features absolutely free of cost.

[read more]

item.title: Converse Desktop [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Converse Desktop [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: kicken
item.itunes:summary:
Converse Desktop
(Chat & Messenging)
A basic integration of [Converse.js](https://conversejs.org/) and Electron. With OMEMO.
### Features

- Permanent account storage
- Tray icon
- Tray notifications
- All the best from Converse.js like system notifications, MAM, OMEMO etc. See details at [Converse.js](https://conversejs.org/)

[read more]
item.description:

- All the best from Converse.js like system notifications, MAM, OMEMO etc. See details at [Converse.js](https://conversejs.org/)

Converse Desktop
(Chat & Messenging)
A basic integration of [Converse.js](https://conversejs.org/) and Electron. With OMEMO.

- Permanent account storage
- Tray icon
- Tray notifications
- All the best from Converse.js like system notifications, MAM, OMEMO etc. See details at [Converse.js](https://conversejs.org/)

[read more]

item.title: MailDivert MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailDivert MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mathew045
item.itunes:summary:
MailDivert MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert MBOX Converter for Mac & Windows is an expert utility that guides users with easy and accurate migration of MBOX mailboxes to 20+ saving options – PST, EML, MBOX, PDF, HTML, MSG, RTF, Office 365, Gmail, Exchange, IMAP Server, IBM Verse, Amazon WorkMail etc. The tool supports batch as well as selective email migration, as per users’ requirements. In addition, the simple GUI of MBOX Converter guarantees easy and effortless migration of MBOX, MBX, MBS and without extension MBOX files supported by 20+ email clients. Moreover, the software also supports numerous beneficial features such as advance filters, file naming options, preview option and many more to help users perform quick MBOX migration in a complete seamless manner. Download free demo edition of the software to check its functionality by converting first 25 emails per MBOX file absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
item.description:
MailDivert MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert MBOX Converter for Mac & Windows is an expert utility that guides users with easy and accurate migration of MBOX mailboxes to 20+ saving options – PST, EML, MBOX, PDF, HTML, MSG, RTF, Office 365, Gmail, Exchange, IMAP Server, IBM Verse, Amazon WorkMail etc. The tool supports batch as well as selective email migration, as per users’ requirements. In addition, the simple GUI of MBOX Converter guarantees easy and effortless migration of MBOX, MBX, MBS and without extension MBOX files supported by 20+ email clients. Moreover, the software also supports numerous beneficial features such as advance filters, file naming options, preview option and many more to help users perform quick MBOX migration in a complete seamless manner. Download free demo edition of the software to check its functionality by converting first 25 emails per MBOX file absolutely free of cost.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MailDivert MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert MBOX Converter for Mac & Windows is an expert utility that guides users with easy and accurate migration of MBOX mailboxes to 20+ saving options – PST, EML, MBOX, PDF, HTML, MSG, RTF, Office 365, Gmail, Exchange, IMAP Server, IBM Verse, Amazon WorkMail etc. The tool supports batch as well as selective email migration, as per users’ requirements. In addition, the simple GUI of MBOX Converter guarantees easy and effortless migration of MBOX, MBX, MBS and without extension MBOX files supported by 20+ email clients. Moreover, the software also supports numerous beneficial features such as advance filters, file naming options, preview option and many more to help users perform quick MBOX migration in a complete seamless manner. Download free demo edition of the software to check its functionality by converting first 25 emails per MBOX file absolutely free of cost.

[read more]

item.title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: walberthvieira
item.itunes:summary:
Microsoft Office 365 AppImage - Nao oficial
(Office Apps)
About the application:
Application developed using Electron. Packaged using AppImageTools. It basically opens the Microsoft Office 365 login screen.

1. Download the Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest file.
2. Unzip it and open the extracted folder.
3. Tap the Instalar.sh executable file and run it.
4. The application has been installed successfully.
-------------------------------------------------------------------
Sobre a aplicação:
Aplicação desenvolvida usando Electron. Empacotada usando AppImageTools. Ela basicamente abre a tela de login do Microsoft Office 365.

1. Baixe o arquivo Microsoft_Office_365_AppImage_20250516-21h55 Latest.
2. Descompacte-o e abra a pasta extraída.
3. Toque o arquivo Instalar.sh executável e o execute.
4. O aplicativo foi instalado com sucesso.

Vídeo ensinando a instalar:
https://youtu.be/DAcmosUJKyM
[read more]

item.title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]
item.description:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]

item.title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]
item.description:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]

item.title: MailDivert vCard Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailDivert vCard Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mathew045
item.itunes:summary:
MailDivert vCard Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert vCard Converter is an outstanding tool that helps users to convert single as well as multiple vCard files to PST, PDF, MBOX, CSV, Office 365, DOC etc. The VCF Converter Tool supports conversion of all types of vCard files having single/multiple contacts without losing any contact details. In addition, the software is capable of splitting large sized vCard file into various smaller vCard files and combining multiple VCF files into a single VCF file. The simple interface of vCard Converter enables all home and professional users to seamlessly perform the vCard migration process. Besides that, the software supports vCard files of all digital devices, laptops, iPhones, Smartphones, email services etc. having different versions such as 2.1, 3.0 and 4.0 and successfully converts them to desired saving options with complete efficiency. free trial edition of vCard Converter help users with quick analysis of the software and even supports conversion of first 5 contacts from 5 selected vCard files without any charges.
Read more >> https://www.maildivert.com/vcard/
[read more]
item.description:
MailDivert vCard Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert vCard Converter is an outstanding tool that helps users to convert single as well as multiple vCard files to PST, PDF, MBOX, CSV, Office 365, DOC etc. The VCF Converter Tool supports conversion of all types of vCard files having single/multiple contacts without losing any contact details. In addition, the software is capable of splitting large sized vCard file into various smaller vCard files and combining multiple VCF files into a single VCF file. The simple interface of vCard Converter enables all home and professional users to seamlessly perform the vCard migration process. Besides that, the software supports vCard files of all digital devices, laptops, iPhones, Smartphones, email services etc. having different versions such as 2.1, 3.0 and 4.0 and successfully converts them to desired saving options with complete efficiency. free trial edition of vCard Converter help users with quick analysis of the software and even supports conversion of first 5 contacts from 5 selected vCard files without any charges.
Read more >> https://www.maildivert.com/vcard/
[read more]

(Utilities)
MailDivert vCard Converter is an outstanding tool that helps users to convert single as well as multiple vCard files to PST, PDF, MBOX, CSV, Office 365, DOC etc. The VCF Converter Tool supports conversion of all types of vCard files having single/multiple contacts without losing any contact details. In addition, the software is capable of splitting large sized vCard file into various smaller vCard files and combining multiple VCF files into a single VCF file. The simple interface of vCard Converter enables all home and professional users to seamlessly perform the vCard migration process. Besides that, the software supports vCard files of all digital devices, laptops, iPhones, Smartphones, email services etc. having different versions such as 2.1, 3.0 and 4.0 and successfully converts them to desired saving options with complete efficiency. free trial edition of vCard Converter help users with quick analysis of the software and even supports conversion of first 5 contacts from 5 selected vCard files without any charges.
Read more >> https://www.maildivert.com/vcard/
[read more]

item.title: MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mailsdaddysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter is a safe solution to convert OST files into PST format. Using this safe solution users can export OST file into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server and others. It offers users to convert multiple OST files into PST format with complete data security. It allows users to view complete OST file databases into the preview section. The software also facilitates users to convert large OST files into PST format with full accuracy.
By taking the help of this advance software users can convert multiple OST files into PST format without hassle. It has the ability to export multiple OST files into single or separate PST files. Users can also break a heavy OST file into small PSTs. The application provides a safe PST file that can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

Users can download the free trial version pack of this solution that allows users to convert the first 20 email items per mailbox from OST to PST

[read more]
item.description:
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter is a safe solution to convert OST files into PST format. Using this safe solution users can export OST file into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server and others. It offers users to convert multiple OST files into PST format with complete data security. It allows users to view complete OST file databases into the preview section. The software also facilitates users to convert large OST files into PST format with full accuracy.
By taking the help of this advance software users can convert multiple OST files into PST format without hassle. It has the ability to export multiple OST files into single or separate PST files. Users can also break a heavy OST file into small PSTs. The application provides a safe PST file that can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

Users can download the free trial version pack of this solution that allows users to convert the first 20 email items per mailbox from OST to PST

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter is a safe solution to convert OST files into PST format. Using this safe solution users can export OST file into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server and others. It offers users to convert multiple OST files into PST format with complete data security. It allows users to view complete OST file databases into the preview section. The software also facilitates users to convert large OST files into PST format with full accuracy.
By taking the help of this advance software users can convert multiple OST files into PST format without hassle. It has the ability to export multiple OST files into single or separate PST files. Users can also break a heavy OST file into small PSTs. The application provides a safe PST file that can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

Users can download the free trial version pack of this solution that allows users to convert the first 20 email items per mailbox from OST to PST

[read more]

item.title: MailDivert OLM Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailDivert OLM Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mathew045
item.itunes:summary:
MailDivert OLM Converter
(Utilities)
MailDivert OLM Converter for Mac & Windows is a remarkable solution for users who are searching for a professional method to convert Mac Outlook OLM files without any data loss. The tool supports conversion of Mac OLM files to PST, PDF, CSV, OLM, vCard, ICS, MBOX, HTML, EML, DOC, Office 365, Exchange, Gmail, Outlook.com, Yahoo Mail, IMAP Server and many more. It’s a complete tool that supports conversion of entire OLM data including emails, contacts, calendars, notes etc. without losing any details. The Mac OLM Converter is equipped with intuitive GUI, enabling all users to effortlessly convert OLM mailboxes without any technical support. In addition, the OLM Converter supports batch migration mode, change language option, file naming options, advance filters for selective data transfer and various other beneficial features to help users effectively convert OLM files/folders. Free demo edition of OLM Migrator enables users to check its performance by converting first 25 items from each selected OLM file without paying any charges.
Read More >> https://www.maildivert.com/olm/
[read more]
item.description:
MailDivert OLM Converter
